description: Show detail on a specified Project Distribution Group

parameters.name: distribution_group_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the distribution group.

parameters.name: view
parameters.description: Parameter affecting what level of detail will be returned from the endpoint. 'extended' will include the users in the distribution group.

parameters.name: domain_id

parameters.name: min_ual
